response.original_title: How to unlock cro lockup?Crypto.com CRO Unlock Process Explained for Beginners
response.overview: Introduction  CRO lockup is a staking feature on Crypto.com where users lock their CRO tokens for a fixed period to earn rewards, benefits, or higher card tiers. While it is a popular way to earn passive income, many users eventually want to unlock their CRO for trading, withdrawal, or other investment opportunities. Meta Title: How to Unlock CRO Lockup? Step-by-Step Guide (2026) Meta Description: Learn how to unlock CRO lockup on Crypto.com, staking rules, unbonding period, withdrawal process, and what happens after unlocking CRO tokens. What Happens After Unlocking CRO? CRO returns to your wallet You can trade or withdraw it Staking rewards stop Card benefits may change Snippet:  Unlocked CRO becomes freely usable again. Rewards end once staking is stopped. Here are 10 SEO-optimized, high CTR titles for “How to unlock CRO lockup?” (designed for Google ranking and strong search intent):
